name: market-research-benchmark
safety_limits: do not scrape or clone external repositories automatically
do not install skills or tooling
do not modify Atlas or derived projects
forbidden_actions: activate MCPs or browser automation from benchmark output
treat documented repos as verified local evidence
rewrite Atlas based on benchmark output without approval
human_approval_triggers: the benchmark result would add a new Atlas skill or workflow
the benchmark suggests runtime-heavy or automation-heavy behavior
the benchmark recommendation widens external dependency surface
rollback_manual: no rollback needed because the skill is read-only
validations: Atlas capability coverage is tied to real local paths
documented-only references are marked with lower confidence
high-risk runtime patterns remain watchlist or discard by default
next actions stay advisory and bounded
